{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301215373F4B8A08D8790A6FE55"}"},"total":6027},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299265298275271458","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉很优秀，没有打怪升级没有奇缘，全文把游和情写的很突出，不过度干预，不结恩怨，不打了小了来了老的，文中没有绝对的恶，伏笔很多，很慢，不是快餐一样的修仙，不开后宫，更像是修心，在游中的变化。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699494124,"group_id":"7146532231924681735","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1YUHliuYolam9YgrFw0JLI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/949a9acac3694007bb2a1b7b96613859~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795535&x-signature=Tjuz%2Fz%2FCsscbF28XpO21w0a872U%3D","user_id":"6900821649","user_name":"爱吃菜炒蛋的刘掌柜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6900821649","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1711711881,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7146532231924681735","book_info":{"abstract":"一场意外将陈长生带到了一方仙侠世界，而他自身却被诅咒环绕，朝生暮死。
至此之后，他每三年只活过来一天，继而继续沉睡，轮回不休。
但却也因此被各路神仙误以为他是得道高人。
机缘巧遇之下，他走上了修行之道，苦寻破解蜉蝣诅咒的方法。
每次醒来，却又恍若隔世。
秋风吹起，故人凋零。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aa8fabe46a1c1aabcd0bd293667ca98e","author":"四更不睡","author_id":"","book_id":"7146532231924681735","book_name":"长生仙游","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7147872833866203655","read_count":"35332","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3109918"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1504","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,穿越,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e804414942c4d0eda16d5a62a2802b40~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384113&x-signature=cbuYq7wZDTsgt5WqXFbolFZ%2FgLI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2882891e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301215373F4B8A08D8790A6FE55"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":67,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12905,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":50830},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7377781276600517400","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，你我都俗人，人间烟火气，最抚凡人心，看过烂柯，前期确实有些地方很像，但礼之一字，在人的身上表现都大抵相同，也不是什么难以接受之事，后期的故事也是会扣着些不太松散，讲一些其他人的故事，也未尝不可，也是有点睛之笔的意味，你我终究是以人的眼光看的，自然能感同身受一些，中间虽然有些小崩，但是现在来看也不是什么大问题，是本难得的好书，希望后期能圆满一些，不要有太大的差异感。","text_exts":[{"e":22,"s":17,"text":"最抚凡人心","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%80%E6%8A%9A%E5%87%A1%E4%BA%BA%E5%BF%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420011390A6FE55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227377781276600517400%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227146532231924681735%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%80%E6%8A%9A%E5%87%A1%E4%BA%BA%E5%BF%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717775237,"group_id":"7146532231924681735","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw9VruJv7jUTH6aiBNkw5sI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"266515236267207","user_name":"不计其数的大畑裕之"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"266515236267207","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"
